sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَكُونُ لَطِيفًا مَعَ الآخَرِينَ تَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada si ljubazan prema drugima osjećaš se lagodno.
sentences.translationEn: When you are kind to others you feel at ease.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ أَحْمَدُ كَلِمَةً طَيِّبَةً لِزَمِيلِهِ الْحَزِينِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je rekao lijepu riječ svom tužnom drugu.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed said a kind word to his sad classmate.

sentences.translation: Drug se nasmiješio i osjetio se bolje.
sentences.translationEn: The classmate smiled and felt better.

sentences.translation: Ljubaznost čini dan ljepšim za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Kindness makes the day more beautiful for everyone.
